- [ ] Targeted tests
- [ ] `make verify`

## Risk and recovery

Failure modes, rollout/rollback notes, data or API compatibility, and observability:

## Contract checklist

- [ ] Sandbox-only behavior remains enforced
- [ ] Tenant boundaries and redaction remain intact
- [ ] Mutations remain idempotent
- [ ] Webhook processing remains duplicate-safe and order-independent
- [ ] Documentation and workstream state are current
